mapper.select: select user_id from conversation_user where conversation_id = #{conversationId}

select cu.conversation_id,cu.unread_count,c.last_message,c.last_time,u.nickname from conversation_user as cu left join conversation as c on cu.conversation_id = c.id left join conversation_user as other on cu.conversation_id = other.conversation_id and cu.user_id != other.user_id left join user as u on other.user_id = u.id where cu.user_id = #{userId};
